cards.back: Agile is an iterative and adaptive approach to project management, while Waterfall is a linear and sequential approach.
In Scrum, the roles are Product Owner, Scrum Master, and Development Team.
A Gantt chart is a type of bar chart used to represent the duration of tasks and dependencies in a project.
Kanban is a visual system for managing work that emphasizes continuous flow and limiting work in progress.
WBS is a hierarchical decomposition of a project into smaller, manageable tasks and activities.
